description: Gaps remaining AFTER wave 2 agents complete. These are features needed for best-in-class construction ERP.

critical_gaps.description: Formal RFI workflow: create → assign → respond → close. Link to docs/drawings/issues. Track SLA/deadlines. Mobile + web.
Submittal packages: create → submit → review → approve/reject/revise. Link to specs/drawings. Track ball-in-court.
entities: Submittal (exists in PTO but needs PM-workflow expansion)

critical_gaps.feature: RFI → Change Event → RFQ → Change Order chain
critical_gaps.description: Full change management: change event from RFI/issue → potential change order → RFQ for pricing → approved change order → budget/schedule impact
Documents as containers with lifecycle states, transmittals, revision sets, metadata classification
Track committed costs (POs, subcontracts), forecast EAC/ETC, cash flow projection, cost-to-complete
Primavera-grade: WBS hierarchy, critical path calculation, resource leveling, baseline management, EVM metrics
Project pipeline/funnel, bid packages, prequalification, KP generation, win/loss tracking
Visual workflow builder for approvals/statuses, automation rules (when X then Y), run history, SLA tracking
Commissioning checklists, handover document packages, warranty tracking, defect claims post-handover
Side-by-side bid comparison, weighted scoring, recommendation, approval workflow

critical_gaps.feature: Aconex-grade immutable record for critical objects
critical_gaps.description: Documents/contracts/payments/acts cannot be deleted, only superseded. Full audit trail with cryptographic integrity.

critical_gaps.feature: CSV/Excel import/export for all major entities
critical_gaps.description: Bulk import materials, employees, BOQ items from Excel. Export any table/report to CSV/Excel/PDF
Tenant-level isolation, cross-company reporting, inter-company transactions
entities: already partial in organization module, needs enforcement

critical_gaps.description: Revenue recognition by percentage of completion, transition to FSBU 9/2025 from 2027

wave3_plan: After wave 2 agents complete, launch wave 3 to cover: RFI/Submittals/Change Management, CDE proper, Cost Management depth, Portfolio/CRM, Workflow Engine, Closeout, and massive frontend build-out
